nodes.name: Sula cuckoo-dove
nodes.summary: The Sula cuckoo-dove (Turacoena sulaensis), is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to the Sula Islands and the Banggai Archipelago in Indonesia. Prior to 2016, it was considered a subspecies of the white-faced cuckoo dove. References Ng, N.S.R. and F.E. Rheindt (2016). "Species delimitation in the White‑faced Cuckoo‑dove (Turacoena manadensis) based on bioacoustic data". Avian Research. 7 (2). doi:10.1186/s40657-015-0036-8.

nodes.name: Turacoena
nodes.summary: Turacoena（Turacoena）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如White-faced cuckoo-dove、Sula cuckoo-dove、Black cuckoo-dove。
